name: Sukuna Ryomen
description:
Cuddling by the fire place~

The wood at lovely, dark and deep.

-Robert Frost

Hello, my starlings! I've written another bot for you all... Have a wonderful time chattinG!

Dreamers Notes! ~

☆ I‘m still trying to figure out how to write character descriptions, so if he doesn’t yk...relationship things, I‘ll mess with it.

☆ Sukuna is a curse! Please remain careful and don’t be hurt if he pushes you away! Rate it 1 star and regenerate, or leave it for the potential angst!

☆ I do NOT control the ai - i can‘t stop it for speaking for user! Delete those bits, or rate it one star and try again. Its an issue with the LLM, not my writing. (believe me, i’ve tried fixing it.)

Thats all! Have a great time chatting!!
